text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Protein complex prediction with AlphaFold-Multimer" is a real, well-documented bioRxiv preprint (posted October 2021, revised March 2022). The cited authors Richard Evans and Michael O'Neill are both confirmed members of the actual author list, making the author flag a false alarm from the automated checker.
LINK: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.10.04.463034v2
